Title: Laravel Framework: CRLF injection in default email rule
Description: A CRLF injection vulnerability in Laravel's email validation, in combination with how Symfony Mailer and Symfony Mime handle certain character sequences, may allow an unauthenticated attacker to interfere with outbound email processing in applications that send mail to user-supplied addresses.
AffectedVersions: All versions before 12.60.0, all versions starting from 13.0.0 before 13.10.0
NotImpacted: All versions starting from 12.60.0 before 13.0.0, all versions starting from 13.10.0
